CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-30-2022 CONTINUED TO OCT-18-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. ***NOTE: PLEASE FILE A RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ADVISING WHETHER THE CASE IS STILL SETTLED AND WHETHER A TRIAL DATE IS NEEDED.***. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-30-2022 IN 206, PLAINTIFF DAVID ANDREW PHILLIPS' MOTION TO SET NEW TRIAL DATE AND REOPEN DISCOVERY WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY PLAINTIFF DAVID PHILLIPS, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT; GORDON ALLRED, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS BOTTOM LINE UTILITY SOLUTIONS, INC. AND BLAKE KENNISON SONKE. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF PLAINTIFF'S MOVING PAPERS PER LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) AND REQUIRED PLAINTIFF TO PAY A $60 MOTION FILING FEE VIA E-FILING IN LIEU OF FILING A NEW MOTION. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION AND SET THE TRIAL DATE FOR 07/24/23 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. ALL DISCOVERY TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT CONFORMS WITH THE COURT'S RULING, SERVE ON OTHER SIDE FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND SUBMIT TO THE COURT. UPON APPROVAL & FILING OF THE ORDER, PLAINTIFF TO SERVE ORDER. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE OF THE NEW TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
